summary.intent: Merge the main branch into the httpd-crate branch twice (two separate sessions), resolving all conflicts, and push the result.
summary.outcome: Both merges completed successfully. First merge resolved 23 conflicts, fixed a rustls crypto provider initialization that needed to move from gateway to httpd crate, and removed an unused MAX_LIFETIME constant. Second merge resolved a single conflict by relocating a new test file and updating its imports to match the refactored module structure.

repo: The httpd-crate branch moved TLS/rustls dependencies from the gateway crate to the httpd crate — gateway's tls feature is now empty.
Integration tests were moved from crates/gateway/tests/ to crates/httpd/tests/ as part of this branch's refactoring.
Functions build_gateway_base and finalize_gateway_app were moved from moltis_gateway to moltis_httpd.
The rustls crypto provider (install_default()) must be initialized early in httpd's start_gateway function, not in gateway's server.rs.

code.finding: Removed rustls::crypto provider init block — the tls feature in gateway is now empty and httpd handles TLS directly.
Added rustls::crypto::aws_lc_rs::default_provider().install_default() early in start_gateway to replace the removed gateway-side init.
Local MAX_LIFETIME constant was shadowed by module-level MAX_BROWSER_INSTANCE_LIFETIME; the local one was unused and was removed.
Test added in main under crates/gateway/tests/ needed to be relocated to crates/httpd/tests/ and its imports updated from moltis_gateway to moltis_httpd.

workflow: Cargo.lock merge conflicts are best resolved by taking main's version and running cargo fetch rather than manually resolving markers.
After a large merge, grepping for <<<<<<< markers is a reliable way to confirm all conflicts are resolved before attempting compilation.
Parallel agent dispatch is effective for resolving large numbers of independent file conflicts (23 files split into 3 groups).
Compilation output is the authoritative check — a clean build confirms both conflict resolution and semantic correctness.

friction: 23 conflicts in the first merge required significant parallel resolution effort across many files.
The rustls install_default() call was silently missing from the httpd crate after the TLS code was restructured — only caught via compile error post-merge.
Git placed the conflicting test file in crates/httpd/tests/ but its imports still referenced the old moltis_gateway crate, requiring a manual fix.
